attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 51 answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation)

codes_manifest.display: Burn involving multiple regions of respiratory tract

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00021, derived from source AUC-021) — maintainer to confirm/reassign; note the source folder has a filename collision, with both 'Burns' and 'Cardiac Arrest' files labelled AUC-021 (the Cardiac Arrest note's own internal Case ID field reads AUC-022) — flagged per protocol for maintainer resolution.
No BURN-specific specialty_tags enum value exists; DERM (skin/burn injury) and RESP (inhalation injury) used as the closest fit.

Source note describes in-person IN fentanyl administration, plastic wrap dressing, and 000 dispatch already having occurred; presentation layer models the case at the point of initial telehealth contact per protocol reprojection rules.
TBSA%, vitals, and oropharyngeal/facial examination findings were clinician-observed and sealed into 10/11 rather than placed in patient-reportable content.
Exact age not stated in source; a plausible adult age was assigned as a conservative placeholder.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
